ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dashboard */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Unique slug for the dashboard URL */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the dashboard */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON data containing the dashboard configuration */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the dashboard belongs to */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dashboard */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "gnet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Grafana Net (GNet) dashboard if imported */,
  "plugin_id" TEXT /* ID of the plugin associated with the dashboard */,
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the folder where the dashboard is stored */,
  "is_folder" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the entry is a folder */,
  "has_acl" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the dashboard has access control lists (ACLs) */,
  "uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dashboard */,
  "is_starred" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the dashboard is starred */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the dashboard is public */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for better search and organization */,
  "last_viewed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the dashboard was viewed */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Soft delete flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_folder_id FOREIGN KEY ("folder_id") REFERENCES folders ("folder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_gnet_id FOREIGN KEY ("gnet_id") REFERENCES gnet_dashboards ("gnet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the organization (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the organization */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the user belongs to */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is an admin at the platform level */,
  "is_super_admin" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is a super admin with global access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "folders" (
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each folder */,
  "folder_name" TEXT /* Name of the folder */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the folder belongs to */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the folder was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the folder was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the folder */,
  "is_starred" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the folder is starred */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Soft delete flag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the folder */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the folder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("folder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_folders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_folders_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "acl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the access control applies to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the access control applies to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control entry was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control entry was last updated */,
  "is_inherited" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the access control is inherited from a parent folder */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Soft delete flag */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access control entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the version belongs to */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dashboard */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON data containing the dashboard configuration */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the changes made in this version */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Soft delete flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_versions_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugins" (
  "plugin_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each plugin */,
  "plugin_name" TEXT /* Name of the plugin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plugin */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the plugin */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the plugin was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the plugin was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the plugin is active */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Soft delete flag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the plugin */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the plugin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plugin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugins_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugins_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gnet_dashboards" (
  "gnet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard on Grafana Net */,
  "gnet_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard on Grafana Net */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard on Grafana Net */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dashboard on Grafana Net */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created on Grafana Net */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated on Grafana Net */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Soft delete flag */,
  "is_imported" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the dashboard has been imported */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who imported the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gnet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gnet_dashboards_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
